## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, config, dependencies
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code rewrite, no functional change
- [ ] `style` — formatting or visual change
